CVE-2023-50472.title: cJSON v1.7.16 was discovered to contain a segmentation violation  ...
CVE-2023-50472.description: cJSON v1.7.16 was discovered to contain a segmentation violation via the function cJSON_SetValuestring at cJSON.c.
CVE-2023-50472.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.
